lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now I am a knight of the round table, do you have any more quests for me?

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Aha! I'm glad you are here! I am sending out various knights on an important quest. I was wondering if you too would like to take up this quest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me of this quest.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Well, we recently found out that the Holy Grail has passed into Gielinor.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: This is most fortuitous!

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: None of my knights ever did return with it last time. Now we have the opportunity to give it another go, maybe this time we will have more luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd enjoy trying that.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Go speak to Merlin. He may be able to give a better clue as to where it is now you have freed him from that crystal.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: He has set up his workshop in the room next to the library.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I may come back and try that later.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Be sure that you come speak to me soon then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am weary of questing for the time being...

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Maybe later then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe so.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Thank you for retrieving the Grail! You shall be long remembered as one of the greatest heroes amongst the Knights of the Round Table!

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Welcome, brave knight. I am always happy to see you back at my court. Please feel free to roam the castle and make use of the training grounds.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Welcome to my court. I am King Arthur of the Knights of the Round Table.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to become a Knight of the Round Table!

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Really? Well then you will need to go on a quest to prove yourself worthy. My knights all appreciate a good quest.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Unfortunately, our current quest is to rescue Merlin. He recently got himself trapped in some sort of magical crystal. We've moved him from the cave we found him in and now he's upstairs in his tower.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will see what I can do then.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Talk to my knights if you need any help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I may come back and try that later.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Be sure that you come speak to me soon then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what are you doing in Gielinor?

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: Well legend says we will return to Britain in its time of greatest need. But that's not for quite a while yet.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: So we've moved the whole outfit here for now.

lines.speaker: King Arthur
lines.text: We're passing the time in Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you very much.
